title: Investment transforms historic Tile Hill homes
summary: Forty historic homes in Coventry have been transformed following the completion of a £2.1 million refurbishment programme.

title: Football match shines spotlight on victims of domestic abuse
summary: Colleagues in our Housing and Homelessness Team have been linking with Sky Blues in the Community to host a World Cup-inspired football tournament recently.

title: City centre set for a Big Summer Takeover with free family events on Saturdays in August
summary: Coventry City Council is bringing a burst of summer energy to the city centre this August with the Big Summer Takeover – a month‑long series of free family events in the city centre at weekends

title: Coventry shop ordered to close for repeated sales of illegal tobacco, smoking products, and vapes
summary: Tile Hill Mini Market, located on Station Avenue within Coventry, has been ordered to close for persistently selling illegal tobacco and vapes for the third time.

title: Support for people affected by honour-based abuse
summary: The Council has been highlighting victims of honour-based abuse (HBA) as part of a national day.

title: Award recognition for Coventry parks
summary: Six of Coventry’s parks and green spaces have been awarded the prestigious Green Flag Award, an international quality mark for the best parks and green spaces in the country.
